query:
SELECT
                config_id,
                source,
                price_type,
                fallback_source,
                max_age_hours,
                tolerance_pct,
                stale_action,
                priority
            FROM "ob-poc".cbu_pricing_config
            WHERE cbu_id = $1
              AND is_active = true
              AND instrument_class_id = $2
              AND (market_id IS NULL OR market_id = $3 OR $3 IS NULL)
              AND (currency IS NULL OR currency = $4 OR $4 IS NULL)
            ORDER BY priority ASC
            LIMIT 1
